zh.lifeSummary: 當Joscelin de Dinan於1012年出生在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南時，他的父親Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan39歲，母親Countess Rantlina de Blois35歲。他與Orguen Orio de Leon結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1070年在他的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joscelin de Dinan于1012年出生在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南时，他的父亲Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan39岁，母亲Countess Rantlina de Blois35岁。他与Orguen Orio de Leon结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1070年在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dinan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (now mainly counties Clare and Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Daghnáin ‘descendant of Daghnán’, possibly a diminutive of dagh ‘good’.
French: habitational name from Dinan, in Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany. This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Dineen
meanings: Irish (Cork and Limerick): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinnín ‘descendant of Duinnín’, a byname from a diminutive of donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’.

nameMeanings.name: Joscelin
meanings: A female name, found written Joscelyne and Jocelin, and by corruption Joscelind. A diminutive formed from Latin Justus. The German name Jost is rendered Joscelin.

en.lifeSummary: When Joscelin de Dinan was born in 1012, in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, his father, Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan, was 39 and his mother, Countess Rantlina de Blois, was 35. He married Orguen Orio de Leon. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1070, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joscelin de Dinan est né en 1012, à Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, son père, Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Countess Rantlina de Blois, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Orguen Orio de Leon. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1070, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joscelin de Dinan 1012 in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan 39 und seine Mutter Countess Rantlina de Blois 35. Er hat Orguen Orio de Leon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1070 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joscelin de Dinan è nato il nel 1012 nel Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Countess Rantlina de Blois, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Orguen Orio de Leon. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1070, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joscelin de Dinanが1012年にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーディナンで生まれた時，父Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinanは39歳，母Countess Rantlina de Bloisは35歳であった。Orguen Orio de Leonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1070年に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joscelin de Dinan(이)가 1012년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 딘아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Rantlina de Blois(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Orguen Orio de Leon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1070년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joscelin de Dinan nasceu em 1012, em Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Countess Rantlina de Blois, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Orguen Orio de Leon. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1070, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joscelin de Dinan родился в 1012 г. в местности динан, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Rantlina de Blois, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Orguen Orio de Leon. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1070 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

sm.from 1015 to 1060: mai le 1015 e o'o I le 1060

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joscelin de Dinan nació en 1012, en Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Countess Rantlina de Blois, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Orguen Orio de Leon. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1070, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
